Cell.Data: PLAYER_INTERACTION_KIRKO

The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
SCENE ID
TEXT ID
ENGLISH STRING
LOCALIZED STRING
ALTERNATIVE ENGLISH STRING
ALTERNATIVE LOCALIZED STRING
LOCALIZATION NOTES
DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_01
{STR_leaderName} the bleeder fool! You dare present yourself to the swarm? Speak quickly and with good purpose, or our talons will dissect your meat!
{STR_leaderName}, przeklęty głupcze! Jak śmiesz pokazywać się rojowi? Mów szybko i z sensem, albo nasze szpony rozerwą twoje ciało na kawałeczki!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_02

Krz’Tk Xrrlt Ptkch! {STR_leaderName}, we refuse to swarm with you – you remind us of the hated Enslavers! The Kir’Ko will never allow another to shackle us again. Our hive is hungry for your flesh, so state your intention and then leave us be. We follow a different path from you.

Krz’Tk Xrrlt Ptkch! {STR_leaderName}, nie będziemy twoim rojem – przypominasz nam znienawidzonych ciemiężców! Kir’Ko nikomu już nie pozwolą się zniewolić. Nasz rój pragnie twego mięsa, więc przedstaw swoje intencje i zostaw nas w spokoju. Podążamy inną ścieżką niż ty.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_01
Greetings, mammal. The Kir’Ko hear you and wonder which path you walk. Enlighten our thoughts and we will see how our values align with yours.
Witaj, ssaku. Kir’Ko słyszą cię i zastanawiają się, jaką ścieżką kroczysz. Oświeć nasze myśli, a dowiemy się, czy wyznajemy podobne wartości.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_02
{STR_leaderName} of flesh and metal approaches us. We are Kir’Ko. Our swarm roams free and must first hear your words. Do you follow the path of harmony, or do you seek to spread discord?
Zbliża się do nas {STR_leaderName} z ciała i metalu. Jesteśmy Kir’Ko. Nasz rój jest wolny i musi wpierw usłyszeć twe słowa. Czy podążasz ścieżką harmonii, czy pragniesz tworzyć dysonans?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_03

Our dreams told us of your arrival, {STR_leaderName}. Dreams have shaped our destiny ever since we were still shackled by the Enslavers. We follow their prophetic vision. Are you a good omen or a nightmare?

{STR_leaderName}, nasze sny powiedziały nam o twoim przybyciu. Kształtują nasze przeznaczenie odkąd byliśmy zniewoleni przez ciemiężców. Podążamy za ich proroczymi wizjami. Jesteś dobrym znakiem, czy złym?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_POSITIVE_01
{STR_leaderName}! Our antennae twitch excitedly for this meeting. Please, harmonize with us. We value your thoughts and ideas. Let us share.
{STR_leaderName}! Nasze czułki drgają z niecierpliwości na myśl o tym spotkaniu. Prosimy, zestrój się z nami. Cenimy twoje myśli i pomysły. Podzielmy się nimi.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_POSITIVE_02

You would be welcome to visit our hive, {STR_leaderName}. Since the Unshackling made us free, we have strived for the betterment of all, and we have found that the Kir’Ko are not so different from your kind. Share your dreams with us.

{STR_leaderName}, z przyjemnością powitamy cię w naszym ulu. Od zrzucenia kajdan dążyliśmy do poprawy i odkryliśmy, że Kir’Ko wcale nie różnią się tak bardzo od twojego gatunku. Podziel się z nami swoimi snami.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_01
The Kir’Ko will speak with you now. I represent my brothers and sisters. Talk, tell us your struggles. Then we will talk and tell you of ours.
Kir’Ko będą teraz z tobą mówić. Reprezentuję moich braci i siostry. Przemów, opowiedz nam o swoich walkach. A potem my przemówimy i opowiemy o naszych.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_02
Our swarm greets you once again. Independence has made us strong. We can lend our strength to you, if needed. Tell us of your dreams for the future.
Nasz rój wita cię ponownie. Niepodległość nas wzmocniła. Możemy użyczyć ci naszej siły, jeśli tego potrzebujesz. Opowiedz nam o swoich marzeniach na temat przyszłości.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_PROPOSE_NEUTRAL_01
We have excess goods that you might be interested in, and the swarm desires something of yours. Perhaps a trade?
Mamy nadwyżkę towarów, które mogą was zainteresować. Równocześnie rój potrzebuje trochę tego, co macie. Może dokonamy wymiany?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_RECEIVED_01
Your trade message acknowledged. We will consult the Readers and return with an answer.
Twoja propozycja handlowa została odebrana. Poradzimy się objaśniaczy i wrócimy z odpowiedzią.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_WAR_01
None can contain the swarm! {STR_reasons}. Krz’P Zhm’Pak Gh’Toz! We war with you now!
Nic nie powstrzyma roju! {STR_reasons}. Krz’P Zhm’Pak Gh’Toz! Ogłaszamy wojnę między nami!

{STR_reasons} is a list of reasons, written like "You trespassed" and can be found in this excel sheet. This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_WAR_02
Enough of your tyranny! {STR_reasons}. Your days are numbered now, meat-thing. By claw and bolt, we will scour you from this world!
Dość już waszej tyranii! {STR_reasons}. Wasze dni zostały policzone, worki mięsa. Wyplenimy was z tego świata kulą i pazurem!

{STR_reasons} is a list of reasons, written like "You trespassed" and can be found in this excel sheet. This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_01
Bleeder scum! We dream of you meeting a swift and paltry end, just as you deserve.
Nikczemni posoczyści! Śnimy o waszym szybkim i bolesnym końcu, bo tylko na taki zasługujecie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_02
You remind us of the hideous Enslavers! Your civilization will fall as theirs did. We will spit on your broken corpses.
Przypominacie nam ohydnych ciemiężców! Wasza cywilizacja upadnie tak samo jak ich upadła. Spluniemy na wasze zwłoki.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_03
Pathetic, feeble wormling. Pretend not that we are the lesser beings. First look inside yourself and realize the truth of your own insignificance.
Żałosny, słaby robaczku. Nie próbuj udawać, że to my jesteśmy niższymi istotami. Najpierw wejrzyj w siebie i zrozum prawdę o swojej nieistotności.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_01
Leader {STR_leaderName}, we have heard your dreams resonate through the aether. We are impressed and humbled by your magnanimous presence.
Przywódco {STR_leaderName}, usłyszeliśmy, że twoje sny rozbrzmiewają poprzez eter. Twoja zniewalająca obecność sprawia, że czujemy onieśmielenie i pokorę.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_02
Your works upon this world have delighted the swarm, lifting our spirits in the hope of a warm and bright future. We are pleased to work alongside you.
Twoje działania na tym świecie przysporzyły rojowi radości i podniosły nas na duchu w nadziei na ciepłą i jasną przyszłość. Z przyjemnością będziemy z tobą współpracować.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_03
Your soul is kind and generous, and your people are inspired by your leadership. You are a truly remarkable being.
Twoja dusza jest dobra i łagodna, a twoi ludzie czerpią natchnienie z twojego przywództwa. Jesteś prawdziwie niezwykłą istotą.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_KINDLY_POSITIVE
The Kir’Ko accept the proposed trade. May we both prosper.
Kir’Ko przyjmują tę propozycję handlową. Niech przyniesie korzyść obu stronom.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_DOUBTFUL
Our needs are great, so we must accept the deal. But know that our current desperation is only temporary!
Nasze potrzeby są wielkie, zatem musimy przyjąć tę ofertę. Wiedz jednak, że nasza desperacja nie będzie trwać wiecznie!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_GENERIC_01
Apologies, we cannot do this. Our Readers have determined that this path is too clouded.
Przykro nam, ale nie możemy tego zrobić. Nasi objaśniacze ustalili, że ta droga jest zbyt zamglona.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_IMBALANCE_01
No, never! We do not require your charity. Provide a more welcome offer instead.
Nie, nigdy! Nie potrzebujemy waszej jałmużny. Przedstawcie ofertę, która będzie bardziej do przyjęcia.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Note that all the texts in this document that refer to two people - the speaker and the one spoken too - that can both be male or female.
Note that use of the 'localized' and 'alternative localized string' only applies for the gender of the speaker.
If the gender of the person spoken to requires inflection, please try to translate the text in a way that doesn't require such inflection. If this is impossible, please get in touch with us informing us of which lines this concerns and how they would be inflected in the language you are translating too.
